title: Decide LILYGO PPS production partnership
description: After technical validation, decide whether to pursue a stock T-Echo revision, LICHEN-branded/custom T-Echo, documented rework, another manufacturer, or no PPS-specific hardware. This Bead records a decision; it does not itself authorize spending or contracts.
acceptance_criteria: Decision memo compares validated capacity/power benefit, product fit, open hardware/firmware support, sample quality, NRE, MOQ, landed unit cost, lead time, lifecycle/supply risk, warranty/support, regulatory impact, branding, data/IP/NDA terms, and the 500-node demo economics; fallback radios and bounded-clock alternatives are considered; recommendation names explicit authorization and contractual next steps; project plans stop claiming T-Echo PPS or zero-collision TDMA if evidence does not support them.
